title: Asking the Time and Date 问时间日期
scene: Ben不知道今天的日期和时间，去问妈妈。

lines.en: Mom, what day is it today?
Oh no! Tomorrow is my friend's birthday party!
lines.zh: 哦不！明天是我朋友的生日派对！

lines.en: I'm not sure. Let me check my phone. What time is it now?
lines.zh: 我不确定。让我看看手机。现在几点了？

lines.en: It's half past four in the afternoon.
I still have time to buy a present. What time does the store close?
lines.zh: 我还有时间买礼物。商店几点关门？

lines.en: It closes at six. You should go now!
lines.zh: 六点关门。你应该现在就去！
